Parameter.name: ExecutionMode
Parameter.descriptions: Which mode to use for this instance of PrimeLSARasterTestMethod.

Parameter.name: TfileRasterPrint
Parameter.descriptions: Whether to print to raster tfile.

Parameter.name: Patlist
Parameter.descriptions: Patlist to execute.

Parameter.name: TimingsTc
Parameter.descriptions: TimingsTc for plist execution.

Parameter.name: LevelsTc
Parameter.descriptions: LevelsTc for plist execution.

Parameter.name: ApplyEndSequence
Parameter.descriptions: The ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

Parameter.name: PrePlist
Parameter.descriptions: PrePlist callback to plist execution.

Parameter.name: MaskPins
Parameter.descriptions: Comma separated pins for mask.

Parameter.name: MetadataConfigPath
Parameter.descriptions: Filepath to MetadataConfig. Required for all TM instances.

Parameter.name: HryMapPath
Parameter.descriptions: Filepath to HryMap. Required when in Prescreen and PrescreenPrintMode is set to CTV_Mode.

Parameter.name: RasterConfigPath
Parameter.descriptions: Filepath to RasterConfig. Required for Raster.

Parameter.name: PinMappingSetName
Parameter.descriptions: PinMappingSet to use during execution; this is a name defined in MetadataConfig.

Parameter.name: ReductionConfigSetName
Parameter.descriptions: ReductionConfigSet to use during Raster execution; optional if user needs to reduce internalDB.

Parameter.name: PrescreenMapName
Parameter.descriptions: Key used to store failing arrays in shared storage to be accessed later. Prescreen instance submits DB to this key, Raster instance uses this as the key to fetch from DB.

Parameter.name: PrescreenPrintMode
Parameter.descriptions: print mode for Prescreen. By default this is set to FAILMODE.

Parameter.name: PrescreenHryFlowToken
Parameter.descriptions: HRY flow token for Prescreen. Used for ituff printing.

Parameter.name: PrescreenHryFrequencyToken
Parameter.descriptions: HRY frequency token for Prescreen. Used for ituff printing.

Parameter.name: PrescreenMafLimit
Parameter.descriptions: Maximum number of failing arrays to print to Ituff. By default, this is set to 0, or unlimited.

Parameter.name: OutputTag
Parameter.descriptions: Tag to output info for repair during Rastermode. Required for Raster is passing defects to iCRepair.

Parameter.name: RasterMapSimulation
Parameter.descriptions: A string which will simulate the internal RasterMap for this TM instance. Eliminates the need to run Prescreen by faking locations which need to be rastered..

ExitPort.PortDescriptions: Port for at least one failure in memory in Prescreen.
Port for label does not match MBD convention in Prescreen. Different failures while decoding defects in Raster.
No defects found in Prescreen. Test passed in Raster.
FAny fail condition. (preamble fail, rasterconfig missing definition for array, or exception for domain with no labels. Raster timeout.)
PORT FAIL FOR SW ERROR CONDITION
PORT FAIL FOR HW ALARM CONDITION
